sentences.arabic: دَخَلَ الطُّلَّابُ إِلَى الفَصْلِ وَجَلَسُوا فِي أَمَاكِنِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su ušli u razred i sjeli na svoja mjesta.
sentences.translationEn: The students entered the classroom and sat in their places.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَ المُعَلِّمُ وَكَتَبَ عُنْوَانَ الدَّرْسِ عَلَى السَّبُّورَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nastavnik je došao i napisao naslov lekcije na tabli.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher came and wrote the lesson title on the board.

sentences.translation: Nastavnik je objasnio lekciju jasnim glasom.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher explained the lesson in a clear voice.

sentences.arabic: رَفَعَ بَعْضُ الطُّلَّابِ أَيْدِيَهُمْ لِيَسْأَلُوا أَسْئِلَةً.
sentences.translation: Neki učenici su podigli ruke da postave pitanja.
sentences.translationEn: Some students raised their hands to ask questions.

sentences.translation: Čas je bio zabavan i koristan za sve.
sentences.translationEn: The class was fun and useful for everyone.
